description: Tracks curmudgeon review history and holistic check progress. The points array records what has been reviewed and when — used by the change detection scan to compare fingerprints. Items are no longer ground through sequentially; the curmudgeon reviews content that has changed since its last pass.
review_model_description: Priority queue > human notes > change-detected items > holistic reviews > spot-checks. Sequential Phase 1/2/3 grinding retired as of 2026-04-12.

points.topic: Eclipse test — not what it appears
Relabeling Standard Physics — vocabulary substitution pattern
Post-Hoc Retrodiction — prediction vs retrodiction distinction
Forensic Zoom chart κ=1.67 nT/µGal GRACE chart fabricated

holistic_checks.topic: Narrative arc — does the argument build persuasively from overview to conclusion?

operator_phase2_rerun_commission.rationale: Phase 2 rerun: re-evaluate cross-WIN / cross-section / prose-level integrity after ~6 weeks of substantive content changes since the original April 14 holistic pass. Goal is the structural / "step back from the weeds" assessment that no per-item review can produce — does the overall argument still build persuasively given everything that's landed since then? Are new cross-references missing? Are there new prose redundancies, tone drift, or structural inconsistencies introduced by recent expansions/rewrites? Find structural issues that no per-WIN or per-SEC review can catch.
operator_phase2_rerun_commission.pipeline_state_at_commission: open_issues=0, queue_depth=0, net_velocity_7d=+36, drought_day=41 — natural moment for holistic step-back since change-driven work is drained
